title: Generator wrapper output parsing fix — accept natural-language reports + git diff verification
goal: Fix scripts/run-generator.mjs output parsing layer so the wrapper accepts both (a) structured JSON results matching the generator-handoff output schema and (b) natural-language reports where the model returned the file change directly without a JSON envelope. In case (b), wrapper must verify the deliverable via git diff against the handoff target_files and surface the result text as a recorded artifact rather than failing.

include: test fixtures: add a fixture demonstrating natural-language response acceptance
exclude: Authority documents not directly related (AGENTS.md, SECURITY.md, etc.)
Codex CLI behavior — only Claude side parsing addressed

success_criteria: scripts/run-generator.mjs distinguishes JSON-shaped result from natural-language result and handles both without throwing.
On natural-language path, wrapper runs git diff against handoff allowed_context.target_files and records (changed_files, diff_summary) in generator-run.json.

Wrapper writes a synthetic generator-result.json with task_id/agent/status/change_summary/self_review/log fields populated from the natural-language report and git diff outcome (status: PENDING_VALIDATION on success, HOLD on no diff).
TASK-20260429-009's missing generator-result.json is reconstructed retroactively as a recovery artifact (with provenance note) for audit trail completeness.
Ledger event AGENT_RESULT_RECEIVED reflects PENDING_VALIDATION when file changes match target_files, HOLD with reason otherwise.
TASK-20260429-010 ledger has TASK_CREATED, GENERATION_COMPLETED, VALIDATION_RESULT, MERGE_COMPLETED, REPORT_WRITTEN, TASK_COMPLETED with insight_capture.
reports/TASK-20260429-010.md exists with 2-commit squash pattern observance.
logs/quality-scores.jsonl has a row for TASK-20260429-010.

positive: Use Node.js built-ins only (no new npm dependencies).
Match the existing wrapper code style (same import/error handling patterns).
Document the fallback path clearly in generator-pipeline-ko.md.
negative: Do not include secrets or environment variable values in code or fixtures.
Do not loosen the existing forbidden_flags or secret-scan guards.
Do not bypass schema validation for the JSON path; only the natural-language path uses git-diff verification.
Do not silently swallow real Generator errors — only specific 'unparseable JSON but file changes are valid' case is the new accepted path.

open_questions: Should --output-format be switched from json to stream-json to capture tool-use events for additional verification? Defer to implementation phase.
Should the wrapper synthesize the generator-result.json even on JSON-success path so format is uniform? Probably yes for consistency.
